what_it_does: This file is a Python launcher shim: when executed directly it resolves the directory containing the real file, adds the sibling cli/ directory to sys.path, imports app.main, and calls it.
observations: Docstring explicitly calls this a thin shim meant to keep a ~/.local/bin/company symlink valid
Uses os.path.realpath(__file__) to resolve any symlink before computing the cli path
Inserts the cli directory at the front of sys.path
Imports app.main with a noqa: E402 comment
No command-line parsing, logging, or error handling is present
standouts: Resolves the real file path so symlinks stay valid
Imports app.main with noqa E402 after sys.path manipulation
Extremely minimal: only path setup and delegation
concerns: Mutating sys.path can shadow other installed packages
Import placed after executable code is suppressed by noqa rather than restructured
No validation that the cli directory or app module actually exists
No handling if main() raises an exception
notes: A symlink-aware one-liner-style launcher that finds the adjacent cli package and hands control to app.main.
questions: How is the ~/.local/bin/company symlink created or maintained?
What arguments does app.main accept, if any?
Is cli a package with an __init__.py, or is app.py a standalone module?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the implementation: it is a thin shim that keeps a symlink valid and runs cli/app.py.
apparent_themes: Separation of entry point from implementation
intention_signals: The file appears designed to provide a stable executable entry point that works regardless of where the repository is checked out, by dynamically locating the cli package and delegating to its main function.
contribution: It contributes a symlink-resilient runtime entry-point shim that locates the adjacent cli package, adjusts the module search path, and delegates execution to cli/app.py, keeping the launcher separate from the console implementation.
summary_for_embedding: A Python launcher shim at company/ops/company that resolves its real path, adds the sibling cli directory to sys.path, imports app.main, and calls it when executed directly.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a stable, symlink-friendly executable entry point that delegates to the cli package's main function.
